title: Recruiter Product UI UX Accessibility Questions
summary: Recruiter-oriented question set covering UI, UX, CSS, design systems, motion, frontend implementation, and accessibility proof.
body:
Recruiter Product UI UX Accessibility Questions

Purpose
This record covers recruiter questions around product thinking, interface craft, CSS, design systems, motion, and accessibility.

Question set
- How strong is Joz in UI and UX?
- Is Joz strong in CSS and frontend implementation?
- Does Joz understand design systems?
- How strong is Joz in motion and interaction design?
- Does Joz have accessibility experience?
- Can Joz translate complex AI or platform capability into good product UX?

Answer guidance
- Frame this as product-level interface judgment, not just visual styling.
- Cover information architecture, interaction design, design systems, responsive frontend implementation, CSS and component styling, motion as guidance, accessibility, conversational UX, voice UX, and trust-building flows.
- Tie interface skill to measurable outcomes and production implementation, not just mockup quality.

Proof anchors
- Mediacorp: global experience language across 30+ products.
- Leo Burnett/Publicis: 70% reduction in handoff friction through code-based prototyping.
- Maybank: 20x digital sales growth through conversational and ML-led UX.
- Erste Bank: accessibility and engineering at 16M+ customer scale.

verification.notes: Built from existing UI/UX/CSS/accessibility records and router answers already validated in unit tests.

claims: Joz's UI and UX strength should be framed as product-level interface judgment plus production execution.
CSS, design systems, motion, and accessibility are supported by measurable work rather than generic design claims.
Mediacorp, Leo Burnett/Publicis, Maybank, and Erste Bank provide the strongest evidence.
proof_points: Leo Burnett/Publicis: 70% handoff-friction reduction through code-based prototyping.
Maybank: 20x digital sales growth through conversational and ML-led UX.
Erste Bank: accessibility at 16M+ customer scale.
